items.summary: Generate a CSV file containing 2000 synthetic records matching the jan_dhan_registry_advanced schema with columns: Citizen_ID (12-digit text), Income_Tier, Scheme_Eligibility, Scheme_Amount (number), Last_Claim_Date (DD-MM-YYYY format), Region_Code, Account_Status (Active/Inactive), Aadhaar_Linked (TRUE/FALSE), Claim_Count (number). Ensure data variety includes different income tiers, multiple scheme types (Pension, Health, Education), various region codes, mix of Active/Inactive accounts, TRUE/FALSE Aadhaar linkage status, and claim counts ranging from 0 to 5.
Make the generated CSV file accessible as a downloadable static asset at frontend/public/assets/jan_dhan_registry_2000.csv so users can download the dataset directly from the application.
Add a visible download link or button in the application UI (either in the admin dashboard or a dedicated section) that allows users to download the jan_dhan_registry_2000.csv dataset file.
